2285930.name: Ascendora
2285930.description:
Explore an abandoned laboratory named Ascendora to find the answers you've been looking for!

Search the laboratory for more information and unravel the secrets of your family.

However beware, there may be unknown dangers hiding in the dark...

About Ascendora

Ascendora is a story based horror game played in first person.

You play as the child of a scientist who went missing after an accident at the laboratory they owned.

Even though you were taken care of by old friends of your parents, they refused to tell you anything about them.

Curious to know who they were they are or what happend to them, you finally get your first lead on where to look:

Laboratory Ascendora

Learn about the secrets and hidden lore of Ascendora and your parents.

The player has to find a way to navigate the building. Deactivate security systems and find a way to get around the building.

You might have to find tools hidden around the facility to help you progress.

Descent into the lower levels of the lab to find out the truth of everything that happend.
2285930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
